name: Review card flow — confidence, reveal, grade advances the queue
description: A full review cycle: rate confidence, reveal the answer, grade with an FSRS button, and confirm the session actually advances to a different card or a session-complete screen.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Review Cards link in the sidebar
Verify the answer text becomes visible below the question, and exactly four grade buttons labeled Again, Hard, Good, and Easy are shown together in a single horizontal row
Read and remember the current question text

Verify the session moves forward: either a different question from the one just remembered is now shown with the answer hidden again, or a session-complete summary appears — confirming grading actually advanced the queue rather than leaving the same card on screen
